html:
Exclusive to:

Bile-Covered Slop is a Meat Food Item found in the Shipwrecked DLC. The Tiger Shark will spit some every now and then near its Den to feed Sharkittens.

It can be given to Volcano Altar of Snackrifice to incur its wrath, therefore making eruptions happen sooner during Dry Season. There are many easier options for this purpose, however.

Trivia

  • Mobs such as Sea Hounds, Sharkittens, and Doydoys will eat it, despite having no positive benefit.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

Bile-Covered Slop is a Meat Food Item found in the Shipwrecked DLC. The Tiger Shark will spit some every now and then near its Den to feed Sharkittens.
It can be given to Volcano Altar of Snackrifice to incur its wrath, therefore making eruptions happen sooner during Dry Season. There are many easier options for this purpose, however.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Mobs such as Sea Hounds, Sharkittens, and Doydoys will eat it, despite having no positive benefit.

'''Bile-Covered Slop''' is a [[Meats|Meat]] [[Food]] [[Item]] found in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. The [[Tiger Shark]] will spit some every now and then near its [[Sharkitten Den|Den]] to feed [[Sharkitten]]s.

It can be given to [[Volcano Altar of Snackrifice]] to incur its wrath, therefore making [[Volcano (object)|eruptions]] happen sooner during [[Dry Season]]. There are many easier options for this purpose, however.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Mobs such as [[Sea Hound]]s, [[Sharkitten]]s, and [[Doydoy]]s will eat it, despite having no positive benefit.
